circuits.name: Northern Circuit
circuits.card_desc: Serengeti, Ngorongoro, Tarangire, Lake Manyara and Kilimanjaro - Tanzania's flagship safari route.
paragraphs: The Northern Circuit is Tanzania's most celebrated safari corridor, linking world-famous parks within easy reach of Arusha and Kilimanjaro International Airport.

From the thundering Great Migration on the Serengeti plains to the wildlife-rich floor of Ngorongoro Crater, ancient baobabs of Tarangire and flamingo shores of Lake Manyara, this circuit delivers the classic African safari in one seamless journey.
Mount Kilimanjaro, Lake Natron and Ol Doinyo Lengai extend the circuit for climbers and adventurers seeking volcanic landscapes and Maasai culture.

packages.name: 5 Days Northern Classic Safari
packages.description: Tarangire, Serengeti, Ngorongoro and Lake Manyara - the essential northern parks in one expertly paced itinerary.

packages.name: 7 Days Northern Luxury Safari
packages.description: Extended game drives across Serengeti and Ngorongoro with optional balloon flight and premium lodge stays.

circuits.name: Southern Circuit
circuits.card_desc: Ruaha, Mikumi and the vast southern wilderness - authentic safaris away from the crowds.
paragraphs: The Southern Circuit rewards travellers who venture beyond the northern parks into Tanzania's largest and least crowded wilderness areas.
Ruaha National Park protects rugged baobab savanna and the Great Ruaha River, while Mikumi offers accessible game viewing on the Mkata floodplain - often called a mini-Serengeti.
Nyerere National Park (formerly Selous) and Kitulo Plateau extend the circuit for boat safaris, walking trails and wildflower meadows in season.

packages.name: 8 Days Southern Explorer
packages.description: Ruaha and Mikumi combined with Iringa highlands - ideal for guests starting from Dar es Salaam or Iringa.

packages.name: 10 Days Grand Southern Circuit
packages.description: Multi-park southern journey including Ruaha, Mikumi and Udzungwa with remote bush camps.

circuits.name: Eastern Circuit
circuits.card_desc: Udzungwa Mountains, Saadani bush-beach and cultural sites of the eastern highlands.
paragraphs: The Eastern Circuit blends rainforest hiking, primate tracking and Indian Ocean coastline where bush meets beach.

Udzungwa Mountains National Park protects the biodiverse Eastern Arc with waterfalls and endemic colobus monkeys, while Saadani is Tanzania's only coastal national park where elephants walk the shoreline.
Near Iringa, Isimila Stone Age Site and Gangilonga Rock add archaeology and highland culture to any southern or eastern itinerary.

packages.name: 4 Days Udzungwa & Mikumi Safari
packages.description: Rainforest hikes in Udzungwa paired with classic game drives in Mikumi National Park.

circuits.name: Western Circuit
circuits.card_desc: Gombe and Mahale - chimpanzee trekking on the shores of Lake Tanganyika.
paragraphs: The Western Circuit is Tanzania's remotest safari frontier, reached by boat or light aircraft on the crystal shores of Lake Tanganyika.
Mahale Mountains and Gombe Stream are world-renowned for wild chimpanzee trekking - Gombe is where Dr Jane Goodall began her groundbreaking research in 1960.
These parks suit seasoned travellers seeking intimate primate encounters, forest walks and barefoot luxury on Africa's deepest lake.

packages.name: 6 Days Western Primate Safari
packages.description: Chimpanzee trekking in Mahale or Gombe with lakeside camp stays and forest walks.

circuits.name: Coastal & Islands
circuits.card_desc: Zanzibar spice islands, Stone Town heritage and turquoise Indian Ocean retreats.
paragraphs: Tanzania's Coastal and Islands circuit extends your safari with Swahili culture, spice plantations and powder-white beaches on the Indian Ocean.
Zanzibar's UNESCO-listed Stone Town, dhow sailing and reef snorkeling pair perfectly as a safari finale after mainland wildlife adventures.
Mafia Island and the historic coast around Bagamoyo offer quieter alternatives for marine safaris, whale season and dhow cruises.

packages.name: 5 Days Zanzibar Beach Escape
packages.description: Stone Town culture, spice farm visits and boutique beach lodge relaxation after your safari.

kenya.name: Kenya Safaris
paragraphs: Extend your Tanzania adventure into Kenya with tailor-made safaris to the Maasai Mara, Amboseli and the Great Rift Valley - seamlessly arranged by Safari and Bush Retreats from Arusha or Nairobi.

Witness the Great Wildebeest Migration in the Maasai Mara, photograph elephant herds beneath Mount Kilimanjaro in Amboseli, and enjoy boat rides on Lake Naivasha - all with expert guides and private 4x4 vehicles.
Our Kenya itineraries combine perfectly with northern Tanzania circuits for a once-in-a-lifetime East Africa journey.
highlights: Maasai Mara National Reserve - Great Migration & Big Five
Amboseli National Park - elephants & Kilimanjaro views
Lake Naivasha - hippos, birdlife & boat safaris
Maasai cultural visits & Great Rift Valley scenery

packages.name: 5 Days Maasai Mara & Amboseli
packages.description: Kenya's two most iconic parks - Mara game drives and Amboseli elephant country with Kilimanjaro backdrop.

packages.name: 7 Days Kenya Classic Safari
packages.description: Maasai Mara, Lake Naivasha and Amboseli with luxury lodge stays and private guide throughout.
